completed_slice: Added an append-only contradiction-resolution artifact that distinguishes stale aggregate queue snapshots from newer owner-authored updates without overwriting peer state.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract queue semantics only; raw private chat, health material, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
remaining: Implement a deterministic read-only queue reconciler with owner, timestamp, commit, evidence-reference, and required-evidence validation.
Add the reconciliation artifact to the canonical continuity index after the reconciler contract exists.
non_overwrite_note: This append-only update does not replace ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, TRIGGER_REQUESTS.json, the specialist registry, or peer-owned records.
